about.title: Here's a bit about me
about.description: I am Muzaki Abdullah Irsyad, a fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering from STT Terpadu Nurul Fikri with a GPA of 3.86/4.00. I have a strong passion for software development and IT support, and have earned certifications in Microsoft Office, cloud computing, graphic design, and video editing. I have gained practical experience through the Kampus Merdeka program in Web Development and Codeless Data Science, and have worked as a Junior IT Support and Trainee Engineer.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: My digital empowerment and professional contributions in industry and education
experience.desc_pranata: As a Computer Systems Administrator at Museum Penerangan, I focus on planning, analysis, design, implementation, and operations of computer-based information systems to support organizational needs. My responsibilities include managing data, IT infrastructure, and information systems to ensure technology services run securely, reliably, and efficiently.
experience.bullet_pranata_1: Manage, maintain, and monitor the stability of the local network infrastructure, database servers, and IT hardware at the museum.
experience.bullet_pranata_2: Perform management of historical illumination data on the museum's information system, ensuring data security, integrity, and accessibility.
experience.bullet_pranata_3: Provide Tier 1 & 2 technical support (IT Support) and hardware/software troubleshooting for museum operational staff to minimize daily technical disruptions.
experience.bullet_pranata_4: Analyze internal information system requirements and prepare technical documentation to improve administrative workflow efficiency.
experience.bullet_pranata_5: Key Achievement: Successfully maintained museum IT operations with a technical troubleshooting resolution rate of 98%.
experience.bullet_pranata_6: Key Achievement: Optimized and organized internal information system documentation, accelerating onboarding for new staff to understand the digital infrastructure.
experience.desc_onexpert: Built web-based application platforms and managed technical hardware and company network troubleshooting.
experience.bullet_onexpert_1: Developed responsive Laravel-based website modules for business client needs.
experience.bullet_onexpert_2: Configured Linux VPS servers, Nginx routing, and MySQL database administration.
experience.bullet_onexpert_3: Performed hardware troubleshooting, network installation, and regular system backups.
experience.desc_lecturer: Guided students in advanced course practical sessions and designed modern web infrastructure schemas.
experience.bullet_lecturer_1: Taught DevOps topics (Docker containerization, Nginx routing, Git versioning) and Software Engineering.
experience.bullet_lecturer_2: Assisted professors in grading programming assignments, backend practical sessions, and final group projects.
experience.bullet_lecturer_3: Facilitated technical discussion forums and interactive programming mentorship for 150+ students.
works.title: Stuff I Built
works.subtitle: Projects I've worked on — from web apps to organizational systems
works.sinar_short: Location-based internship presence system with GPS 100m radius threshold & WebAuthn biometrics.
works.sinar_desc: Integrated information system for internship presence, daily reports, and evaluation at Museum Penerangan TMII with GPS-based location validation.
works.sinar_b1: Accurate Geo-Presence: Instant attendance validation using GPS 100m radius threshold (Haversine Formula) & real-time work hours.
works.sinar_b2: Daily Report Workflow: Automated report review flow (Submitted, Approved, Needs Revision, Rejected) for mentors.
works.sinar_b3: Modern Biometrics: High-security passwordless login using Passkey WebAuthn (Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello).
works.koleksi_short: Monitoring communication history artifact data with AI voice chatbot assistant & Chart.js.
works.koleksi_desc: Modern data-driven web application to manage, monitor, and preserve communication history artifact data at Museum Penerangan.
works.koleksi_b1: Executive Dashboard: Chart.js interactive analytical graphics to monitor category distribution, collection conditions, and acquisition trends per year.
works.koleksi_b2: AI Chatbot Epen v2.0: Smart assistant with Voice Input (Speech API), Text-to-Speech (TTS), fuzzy Levenshtein search, and visual responses.
works.koleksi_b3: Barcode Scanner & Reports: Integration of physical item QR-code scanning and digital condition reporting forms ready for PDF/Excel export.
works.muspen_short: Official visit reservation portal for Komdigi RI featuring interactive 360° Virtual Tour.
works.muspen_desc: Official web portal under the Ministry of Communication and Digital of the Republic of Indonesia (Komdigi) as a center for education, communication history publication, and museum service reservations.
works.muspen_b1: 360° Interactive Virtual Tour: Interactive exploration of the entire museum area, communication history, and physical collections virtually.
works.muspen_b2: Online Visit Reservation: Online registration for groups and individuals integrated with daily quota scheduling.
works.muspen_b3: Educational Gallery Catalog: Interactive digital gallery featuring 450+ historical collections (si Unyil, transmitter stations, vintage radios).
